summary: This lecture discusses the chapters on certainty (al-yaqeen) and trust in Allah (al-tawakkul) from Riyadul Saliheen by Imam al-Nawawi. The speaker explains that al-yaqeen refers to absolute certainty in Allah's promises and the inevitability of the afterlife, resurrection, and divine reward and punishment. The lecture emphasizes that this certainty is a choice individuals make to believe in what the Messenger has conveyed, and such conviction protects believers during vulnerable times. The speaker also references Quranic verses about Prophet Yahya and Prophet Isa, highlighting how Allah's protection extends through critical life moments: birth, death, and resurrection.
suggested_title: Riyadul Saliheen: Chapter on Certainty (Al-Yaqeen) and Trust in Allah (Al-Tawakkul)
hadith_chapter: Chapter on Certainty and Trust in Allah (Bab al-Yaqeen wa al-Tawakkul)
catchy_title: How Certainty in Allah Protects Your Heart
